form.formComment: Last outing finished tenth of 16 runners at Wetherby on March 27 over 4300m, 32 len behind Daylatedollarshort with 65.5kg at $67. The start before that; finished 13th of 14 starters at Carlisle on February 16 over 3400m, on slow going 57 len behind He's Bresilian carrying 71kg at $51. This looks too tough.

previousStarts.runner: I C U IN MY DREAMS

form.formComment: Impressive in recent runs. Freshened for 37 days. Last run finished second of 8 runners at Catterick on March 4 over 5100m, 2 len behind Cold Henry with 67.5kg at $5.50. The run before finished third of 9 starters at Catterick on February 24 over 5100m, 8 len behind Dillarchie carrying 69kg at $9. Can return to the winner's stall.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign 7 of 12 runners at Wetherby October 31 over 4300m, 7 len behind Princesse Milania carrying 66.5kg at $13. First up last campaign didn't finish the race at Southwell April 15 over 4900m. Hard to have on form before a break.
